# gen\-schema

```go
import "github.com/stubbedev/mongodb-mcp/cmd/gen-schema"
```

Command gen\-schema writes the JSON Schema for the mongodb\-mcp config file to config.schema.json, derived from the Go config types. It is run by CI and by \`go generate\` so the schema never drifts from the code.
